title: Safer Streets Summer Initiative data
body: "The Safer Streets Summer Initiative ran from 30 June 2025 to 30 September 2025. It was a nationally coordinated, locally designed and delivered programme, led by police and crime commissioners and deputy mayors.  Its focus was to address antisocial behaviour, street crime, and retail crime in 649 town centres and similar areas of different sizes across England and Wales.  This document includes data on operational activity and public perceptions of antisocial behaviour and acquisitive crime.  "
